name: Mustard Pickles
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the cauliflower into flowerets.
2. Peel the onions and slice the peppers very fine.
3. Slice the tomatoes.
4. Combine all four ingredients with the salt.
5. Let stand overnight.
6. Drain, then cover with boiling water and cook until vegetables are soft.
7. Drain again.
8. Heat the vinegar and pour over the flour, sugar, mustard, celery seed, and turmeric mixture.
9. Mix thoroughly.
10. Add the pickles to the cooked vegetables and pour over the liquid.
11. Cook for about 10 minutes or until the mixture thickens.
12. Pour into sterilized jars and seal.
